title: The Impact of Choosing Videoconferencing Over Business Travel
description: A flowchart comparing the environmental and business process outcomes of business travel versus videoconferencing, highlighting the sustainable advantages of the digital alternative.
relationships: A 'Business Need' leads to a 'Decision Point'. The 'Decision Point' splits into two paths: 'Business Travel Path' and 'Videoconference Path'. Each path leads to distinct 'Environmental Outputs' and 'Business Outputs', demonstrating the comparative impact of each choice.
